lean_declaration:
theorem laurentPolynomial_T_isUnit_one : IsUnit ((LaurentPolynomial.T 1 : K[T;T⁻¹]) : K[T;T⁻¹]) :=
  laurentPolynomial_T_isUnit' K 1
notes: This lemma is a direct specialization of the existing laurentPolynomial_T_isUnit' to the indeterminate x (represented by LaurentPolynomial.T 1).
The statement matches the source's claim that the element x is invertible in the K-algebra K[x±].
